query:
SELECT 
  a.id, 
  a.demandId, 
  a.workerId, 
  w.name as workerName, 
  datetime(a.scheduledStart/1000, 'unixepoch') as scheduledStart_readable,
  datetime(a.scheduledEnd/1000, 'unixepoch') as scheduledEnd_readable,
  a.scheduledStart,
  a.scheduledEnd,
  a.status 
FROM assignments a 
LEFT JOIN workers w ON a.workerId = w.id 
WHERE date(a.scheduledStart/1000, 'unixepoch') = '2026-02-14' 
ORDER BY a.scheduledStart;
